sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, DATE '2023-01-01');
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = DATE '2023-12-31' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_date, weekofyear(event_date) AS week_number FROM test_dates;
SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE weekofyear(event_date) = 52;
